response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a full-stack and systems software developer with a strong background in web platforms, TypeScript/Node.js, and low-latency distributed services, but has no demonstrated experience in any of the core competencies required for this role: SoC and IP modeling, AI accelerator architecture, GPU workload analysis, hardware-software co-design, or deep neural network optimization. His closest relevant experience—low-latency DLang services at Sociomantic—is a thin and tangential overlap. The role demands principal-level expertise in hardware performance modeling for AI workloads, which is an entirely different discipline from his career trajectory.
strengths: Low-latency systems experience with async I/O, caching, and high-performance databases at Sociomantic
Broad multi-language background including C/C++ (NI LabWindows, Sound Position Server) indicating some systems-level exposure
Long tenure and consistent technical growth across embedded, desktop, and infrastructure domains
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or any hardware design discipline
No AI, deep learning, or GPU workload expertise anywhere in the resume or project history
Education (BS Computer Science) and experience profile are mismatched with the principal-level hardware architecture depth this role requires
